html:
Exclusive to:

EmptySome PetalsFull (Petals)Full (Dark Petals)Full (Lune Blossoms)

The Sisturn is a character-specific Structure exclusive to Wendy in Don't Starve Together. It requires 3 Cut Stone, 3 Boards, and 1 Ash to craft.

The Sisturn can be decorated with flowers by placing Petals in its inventory slots. The Sisturn produces an aura of +25 /min as long as it is fully decorated with Petals in all 4 slots. Abigail's maximum health levels up 4 times faster if there is a fully decorated Sisturn in the World. Petals perish at the normal rate inside the Sisturn (6 days). Once the Petals have perished, they will turn into Rot that will be placed on the ground close to the Sisturn.

Contents

  • 1 Skill Tree
    • 1.1 Blessed Sisturn I
    • 1.2 Blessed Sisturn II
    • 1.3 Blessed Sisturn III
  • 2 Skins
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Assets
  • 5 Gallery

Skill Tree

Blessed Sisturn I

Petals put inside the Sisturn will stay fresh for 50% longer.

Blessed Sisturn II

If there is a Sisturn filled with Petals in the world, Wendy will have +25% resistance to mobs' negative sanity aura, and being near the Sisturn will give Wendy +40 sanity per minute (instead of +25 sanity per minute). This effect also extends some to other nearby players.

Blessed Sisturn III

Allows one to put Lune Tree Blossom and Dark Petals into the Sisturn.

  • Putting 4 Dark Petals into the Sisturn turns all sanity effects of the Sisturn to negative.
  • Putting 4 Lune Tree Blossoms into the Sisturn gives Abigail the Player tag (50% protection against Bosses), but her regeneration and other healing Ghostly Elixirs will heal 50% slower while she is summoned. It also doesn't work with normal creatures or mini-bosses.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Proof of Purchase Victorian Sisturn skin is obtained by purchasing the Abigail Plush Replica from the Klei Shop.
Woven - Distinguished
Beach House Sisturn
Abigail always loved living by the sea.
Woven - Distinguished
Nested Sisturn
Nestled in beautiful nature, there is nothing natural about losing someone so young.
Proof of Purchase
Victorian Sisturn
A somber sanctuary for Abigail, steeped in the memory, guilt and longing she has come to embody.

Trivia

  • The Sisturn was introduced in the Wendy Character Update as part of the character overhaul for Don't Starve Together.
  • "Sisturn" is a play on "Cistern", a type of reservoir normally used to catch rainwater and a pun on "Sister" and "Urn".

"A place to rest your weary soul."

"sisturn"
EmptySome PetalsFull (Petals)Full (Dark Petals)Full (Lune Blossoms)
“Some flowers would liven it up a bit.”
–Wilson, examining an empty Sisturn.
“A pyre would've been more fun.”
–Willow, examining an empty Sisturn.
“Is like tiny house for bird! But why is little pot here?”
–Wolfgang, examining an empty Sisturn.
“It's a memorial to my sister... but it's so bare...”
–Wendy, examining an empty Sisturn.
“WEAK ORGANIC SENTIMENTALITY”
–WX-78, examining an empty Sisturn.
“The poor dear.”
–Wickerbottom, examining an empty Sisturn.
“Better pay our respects, eh Lucy?”
–Woodie, examining an empty Sisturn.
“I can't help but wonder... no, it couldn't be.”
–Maxwell, examining an empty Sisturn.
“A small langhús för the ghöstly warriör tö regain her strength.”
–Wigfrid, examining an empty Sisturn.
“It's a little Abigail house!”
–Webber, examining an empty Sisturn.
“Poor mademoiselle...”
–Warly, examining an empty Sisturn.
“Lonely”
–Wormwood, examining an empty Sisturn.
“Nothin' stronger than the bond between sisters.”
–Winona, examining an empty Sisturn.
“A touching tribute to a treasured twin.”
–Wortox, examining an empty Sisturn.
“What in jar? Snacks?”
–Wurt, examining an empty Sisturn.
“Yeah, that looks haunted.”
–Walter, examining an empty Sisturn.
“Death should be the farthest thing from a child's mind...”
–Wanda, examining an empty Sisturn.
“A few more flowers should do the trick.”
–Wilson, examining a partially decorated Sisturn.
“You're doing it wrong, those flowers aren't dry enough to burn!”
–Willow, examining a partially decorated Sisturn.
“Wolfgang will find more flowers for tiny house!”
–Wolfgang, examining a partially decorated Sisturn.
“Abigail always loved flowers...”
–Wendy, examining a partially decorated Sisturn.
“FRIVOLOUS”
–WX-78, examining a partially decorated Sisturn.
“I believe flowers are a traditional offering to the deceased.”
–Wickerbottom, examining a partially decorated Sisturn.
“Think it could use a few more flowers, eh?”
–Woodie, examining a partially decorated Sisturn.
“Perhaps I should pay my respects as well.”
–Maxwell, examining a partially decorated Sisturn.
“Flöwers döth please this spirit.”
–Wigfrid, examining a partially decorated Sisturn.
“We can find more flowers!”
–Webber, examining a partially decorated Sisturn.
“Oh, that's looking very nice!”
–Warly, examining a partially decorated Sisturn.
“Friends!”
–Wormwood, examining a partially decorated Sisturn.
“Looks a bit sparse. Maybe I can chip in a flower or two.”
–Winona, examining a partially decorated Sisturn.
“A flowery addition for our apparition!”
–Wortox, examining a partially decorated Sisturn.
“Scale-less like putting flowers here.”
–Wurt, examining a partially decorated Sisturn.
“If I find some flowers I'll bring them back here.”
–Walter, examining a partially decorated Sisturn.
“Well... I guess it wouldn't take too long to gather a few flowers.”
–Wanda, examining a partially decorated Sisturn.
“What a brilliant boo-quet!”
–Wilson, examining a fully decorated Sisturn.
“I guess it's kind of pretty...”
–Willow, examining a fully decorated Sisturn.
“Wolfgang like the flowers, but why is little pot floating?”
–Wolfgang, examining a fully decorated Sisturn.
“I won't let you fade away, Abigail. Never.”
–Wendy, examining a fully decorated Sisturn.
“FRIVOLOUS...”
–WX-78, examining a fully decorated Sisturn.
“The flowers seem to give off an aromatic effect.”
–Wickerbottom, examining a fully decorated Sisturn.
“Pretty as a Canadian sunset.”
–Woodie, examining a fully decorated Sisturn.
“It has a strangely calming effect.”
–Maxwell, examining a fully decorated Sisturn.
“'Tis a fine mönument indeed.”
–Wigfrid, examining a fully decorated Sisturn.
“We feel warm and fuzzy... well, more than usual.”
–Webber, examining a fully decorated Sisturn.
“Such a calming presence...”
–Warly, examining a fully decorated Sisturn.
“Nice here”
–Wormwood, examining a fully decorated Sisturn.
“It looks real nice, kiddo.”
–Winona, examining a fully decorated Sisturn.
“Maybe I should keep my distance...”
–Wortox, examining a fully decorated Sisturn.
“So is... not snack jar?”
–Wurt, examining a fully decorated Sisturn.
“That looks pretty nice.”
–Walter, examining a fully decorated Sisturn.
“I hope she finds some comfort in this.”
–Wanda, examining a fully decorated Sisturn.
“It gives me a bad feeling.”
–Wilson, examining a Sisturn full of dark petals.
“They're driving me nuts.”
–Willow, examining a Sisturn full of dark petals.
“Little flowers make Wolfgang feel strange.”
–Wolfgang, examining a Sisturn full of dark petals.
“These don't make me feel good, but they help Abigail.”
–Wendy, examining a Sisturn full of dark petals.
“PROGRAMMING INTERFERENCE DETECTED”
–WX-78, examining a Sisturn full of dark petals.
“The flowers affect one's mental stability.”
–Wickerbottom, examining a Sisturn full of dark petals.
“They're giving me a headache.”
–Woodie, examining a Sisturn full of dark petals.
“Stop attacking my mind!”
–Maxwell, examining a Sisturn full of dark petals.
“'Tis marring mine musings.”
–Wigfrid, examining a Sisturn full of dark petals.
“Feels like webs in our head.”
–Webber, examining a Sisturn full of dark petals.
“I feel nauseous.”
–Warly, examining a Sisturn full of dark petals.
“Head feel yucky”
–Wormwood, examining a Sisturn full of dark petals.
“They're makin' my head spin.”
–Winona, examining a Sisturn full of dark petals.
“Floral vanity at the cost of my sanity! Hyuyu!”
–Wortox, examining a Sisturn full of dark petals.
“Glurgh... my brain breaking.”
–Wurt, examining a Sisturn full of dark petals.
“They make me feel weird.”
–Walter, examining a Sisturn full of dark petals.
“Ugh, my head!”
–Wanda, examining a Sisturn full of dark petals.
“What an eerie sound.”
–Wilson, examining a Sisturn full of lune blossoms.
“So noisy.”
–Willow, examining a Sisturn full of lune blossoms.
“What that spooky sound?”
–Wolfgang, examining a Sisturn full of lune blossoms.
“I can almost hear your voice, Abby.”
–Wendy, examining a Sisturn full of lune blossoms.
“UNUSUAL FREQUENCY”
–WX-78, examining a Sisturn full of lune blossoms.
“They generate an unearthly sound.”
–Wickerbottom, examining a Sisturn full of lune blossoms.
“What a funny sound.”
–Woodie, examining a Sisturn full of lune blossoms.
“What an odd noise.”
–Maxwell, examining a Sisturn full of lune blossoms.
“Call'th tö memöry the lays öf the Havfrue.”
–Wigfrid, examining a Sisturn full of lune blossoms.
“Is someone talking to us?”
–Webber, examining a Sisturn full of lune blossoms.
“Something is calling from beyond...”
–Warly, examining a Sisturn full of lune blossoms.
“Ghost friend?”
–Wormwood, examining a Sisturn full of lune blossoms.
“Who is makin' that weird noise?”
–Winona, examining a Sisturn full of lune blossoms.
“No one around to make that sound.”
–Wortox, examining a Sisturn full of lune blossoms.
“Huh? Who that?”
–Wurt, examining a Sisturn full of lune blossoms.
“Do you hear that, Woby?”
–Walter, examining a Sisturn full of lune blossoms.
“I don't want to know what's making that noise.”
–Wanda, examining a Sisturn full of lune blossoms.
The Sisturn is a character-specific Structure exclusive to Wendy in Don't Starve Together. It requires 3 Cut Stone, 3 Boards, and 1 Ash to craft.
The Sisturn can be decorated with flowers by placing Petals in its inventory slots. The Sisturn produces an aura of +25 /min as long as it is fully decorated with Petals in all 4 slots. Abigail's maximum health levels up 4 times faster if there is a fully decorated Sisturn in the World. Petals perish at the normal rate inside the Sisturn (6 days). Once the Petals have perished, they will turn into Rot that will be placed on the ground close to the Sisturn.

If there is a Sisturn filled with Petals in the world, Wendy will have +25% resistance to mobs' negative sanity aura, and being near the Sisturn will give Wendy +40 sanity per minute (instead of +25 sanity per minute). This effect also extends some to other nearby players.
Blessed Sisturn III[edit | edit source]
Allows one to put Lune Tree Blossom and Dark Petals into the Sisturn.
Putting 4 Dark Petals into the Sisturn turns all sanity effects of the Sisturn to negative.
Putting 4 Lune Tree Blossoms into the Sisturn gives Abigail the Player tag (50% protection against Bosses), but her regeneration and other healing Ghostly Elixirs will heal 50% slower while she is summoned. It also doesn't work with normal creatures or mini-bosses.
